overall.description: Cinematic survival horror game footage depicting a foggy, rain-soaked night at a rural wooden house. A character in white stands motionless near the entrance as a second figure carrying a lantern slowly approaches from the right through the downpour, creating a tense, atmospheric scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural house exterior in heavy storm

events.description: figure carrying a lit lantern emerges from the right edge and begins walking toward the house

agents.ego_description: character in white clothing stands motionless near the house entrance, facing the approaching figure

notable_agents.action: approaching slowly from the right side carrying a lit lantern through the rain

entered.detail: weathered wooden house with shingled roof and two dormer windows on upper floor
two small windows on the sloped roof of the house
covered porch area at the front entrance of the house
brick chimney visible on the roof peak
tall bare trees silhouetted against the fog on the left side
dense trees and foliage barely visible through the fog on the right
low vegetation and shrubs in front of the house
wooden fence post visible in the lower right foreground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark, rainy night at a rural wooden house surrounded by fog. A character in white stands still near the entrance as a second figure carrying a lantern emerges from the right and begins approaching through the downpour. The atmosphere is tense and atmospheric with heavy rain and limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural house exterior in heavy storm

events.description: lantern light becomes more prominent as the figure moves closer to the house

agents.ego_description: remains stationary near the house entrance, watching the approaching figure

notable_agents.action: continuing to approach the house, lantern swinging slightly as they walk through the rain

segments.scene_description: The lantern-bearing figure continues their slow approach toward the house, moving from the far right to the mid-ground. The warm glow of the lantern becomes more visible against the dark, rainy backdrop. The character in white remains motionless near the entrance as the distance between the two figures closes.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural house exterior in heavy storm

agents.ego_description: still standing near the house entrance as the approaching figure gets within close proximity

notable_agents.action: approaching very close to the house and the standing character, lantern light illuminating the immediate area

segments.scene_description: The figure with the lantern reaches the near foreground, very close to the house and the waiting character. The lantern's light now clearly illuminates the approach path. The heavy rain and fog continue to obscure the background, maintaining the ominous atmosphere as the two characters are about to meet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked night that shifts from a wide, atmospheric standoff to an intimate, illuminated encounter. It begins with a view of a rural wooden house shrouded in dense fog, where a character in white stands motionless as a second figure carrying a lantern emerges from the distant right. As the figure slowly advances through the downpour, the warm glow of the lantern grows more prominent, cutting through the dark backdrop and gradually closing the gap between the two individuals. The scene then shifts as the lantern-bearer reaches the near foreground, casting a clear light across the approach path. Finally, the camera lingers on the two characters as they are about to meet, while the heavy rain and fog continue to obscure the surrounding environment to maintain an ominous mood.
